main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'incorrectly shortened VFD ramp time + hydraulic shock + telescoping lead elements' literal.

alternatives.justification: 3 alts brief (interconnector O-ring, backpressure permeate, defect).

recommended_action.justification: LOTO + verify VFD reprogram 90s + don't restart hasta confirmar — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide actual VFD ramp time — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Single: VFD controller log muestra 90s consistente → switch.
